company_overview: Designs accelerated computing platforms used across AI training, inference, gaming, professional visualization, and automotive workloads.

sec_filing_highlights.summary: Mock 10-Q highlight: management reiterated full-year datacenter guidance and noted continued sequential growth in inference workloads.
Mock 8-K highlight: routine governance disclosure with no material change to strategy.

news_event_summary: Sample event summary: NVIDIA announced an expansion of its Blackwell platform availability across major cloud providers, framed by management as broadening enterprise inference adoption.
bull_case: Durable AI infrastructure capex cycle with diversified hyperscaler demand
Software / CUDA moat compounding alongside hardware refresh cadence
Optionality from sovereign AI deployments and enterprise inference
bear_case: Concentration risk in top hyperscaler customers
Multiple compression risk if rates remain restrictive
Custom silicon competition from major customers
watchlist_triggers: Break of 50-day moving average with confirmation
Hyperscaler capex revision in next earnings cycle
final_summary: Sample NVDA research summary: balanced setup. Datacenter demand remains the dominant variable; risks are concentration and macro multiple compression rather than secular thesis decay.
